evidence_quotes.quote: long-term access to legally purchased digital games
offline modes or enable community-hosted servers when decommissioning titles

paragraphs.text: Dear Commission, The Digital Fairness Act should include provisions ensuring long-term access to legally purchased digital games, even after official servers are shut down. Consumers who pay for digital content must not lose access due to publisher decisions or server closures, especially for games with single-player or local functionality. I urge the EU to mandate that publishers offer offline modes or enable community-hosted servers when decommissioning titles. This is a matter of consumer rights, digital preservation, and trust in digital marketplaces.
